clinical_profile.description: Primary dorsiflexor and invertor of the foot.
Thick transverse band of deep fascia; prevents bowstringing of anterior tendons.
Crucial Y-shaped stabilizer of the extensor tendons. Acts as a pulley system to prevent bowstringing at the midfoot.
Fascial band forming the roof of the tarsal tunnel on the medial ankle.
clinical_profile.nerve: Tibial Nerve (branches into Medial and Lateral Plantar Nerves)

clinical_profile.description: Flexion of the lateral four toes (distal phalanges); plantar flexion of the ankle; inversion of the foot.
Assists flexor digitorum longus in flexing the lateral four toes by aligning its pull; stabilizes the foot during the stance phase.
Abducts and flexes the fifth digit at the metatarsophalangeal joint; supports the lateral longitudinal arch.
Inversion of the foot; plantar flexion of the ankle; primary stabilizer of the medial longitudinal arch.
Flexion of the Great Toe (Hallux); assist in plantar flexion and inversion of the foot.
Flexion of the middle phalanges of the four lateral toes at the proximal interphalangeal joints; also supports the medial longitudinal arch.
Extends the big toe; assists in dorsiflexion.
Extends the lateral four toes.
Intrinsic muscle assisting big toe extension.
Intrinsic muscle fanning out to extend toes 2-4.
Weak dorsiflexor and evertor of the foot.
Eversion of the foot; assists in ankle plantar flexion and maintains lateral ankle stability.
Eversion of the foot and plantar flexion of the ankle; stabilizes the arch during gait.
Body of the Abductor Hallucis; vital for medial longitudinal arch dynamic stability.
pathologies: Myofascial Trigger Points mimicking Plantar Fasciitis

clinical_profile.description: Flexes the proximal phalanx of the hallux (big toe) at the metatarsophalangeal joint.
Adducts the hallux (big toe) and strengthens the transverse metatarsal arch of the foot.
Flexes the proximal phalanx of the little toe at the metatarsophalangeal joint.
Adducts toes 3-5 toward the axial line; flexes metatarsophalangeal joints.
